tasks.title: Analyze Browser Extension Architecture and Feature Modules
tasks.description: Review the extension architecture and feature modules by inspecting docs/extension-architecture.md and the source code under apps/extension/src/. Document any architectural or design issues that could affect functionality or maintainability.
acceptanceCriteria: Complete understanding of extension architecture and feature modules
List of potential architectural or design issues identified
tasks.expectedResult: A documented list of architectural and design issues or improvement points for the extension codebase.

metadata.inputContext: Project documentation and source code of extension
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational understanding and identifies issues for targeted fixes.

tasks.title: Run Static Code Analysis and Complexity Checks on Extension Source
tasks.description: Run code analysis tools and complexity checks on the extension source code to identify code smells, complexity hotspots, and maintainability issues per codegraph.config.json rules.
acceptanceCriteria: Static analysis completes without errors
Report generated with complexity and maintainability metrics
tasks.expectedResult: Static analysis report identifying complexity and maintainability issues in extension source code.

outputPlan.description: Static code analysis and complexity report for extension source

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Identifies code quality issues to prioritize fixes.

tasks.title: Identify and Document Functional Bugs in Extension Features
tasks.description: Manually test key extension features including text selection saving, AI explanation, popup UI, options settings, and storage synchronization. Document any functional bugs or UX issues found.
acceptanceCriteria: All major extension features tested
Functional bugs and UX issues documented with reproduction steps
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed bug report listing functional and UX issues in the extension features.

metadata.inputContext: Extension source code and architecture understanding
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides concrete issues to address for functional correctness.

tasks.title: Refactor Highlighting Logic in apps/extension/src/content-script/highlighter/
tasks.description: Refactor the highlightEngine.ts, highlightMatcher.ts, highlightTooltip.ts, and highlightStyles.ts files to improve code quality, modularity, and maintainability. Apply design patterns such as separation of concerns and encapsulation. Ensure no performance regressions and maintain existing functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: Highlighting logic refactored with improved code structure
No regressions in highlight functionality
Code passes lint and type checks
tasks.expectedResult: Refactored highlight-related source files with improved code quality and no lint/type errors.

metadata.inputContext: Bug report and static analysis results
evidence: files modified with improved code quality
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves core content script highlighting feature for stability and maintainability.

tasks.title: Fix Background Service Worker Messaging and Storage Bridge Logic
tasks.description: Inspect and fix bugs in background service worker files apps/extension/src/background/messaging.ts and storage-bridge.ts to ensure reliable message routing and data synchronization with the web app IndexedDB. Apply best practices for MV3 service workers and asynchronous message handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Background messaging and storage bridge logic corrected
No message loss or sync errors during tests
Code passes lint and type checks
tasks.expectedResult: Fixed background service worker messaging and storage bridge code with no lint/type errors and verified sync functionality.

outputPlan.description: Fixed message routing and event handling
Improved data sync and storage bridge reliability

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures robust background messaging and data sync for extension.

tasks.title: Improve Popup UI Components and Hooks for Performance and Code Quality
tasks.description: Refactor popup components under apps/extension/src/popup/components/ and hooks/usePopupData.ts to improve performance, code clarity, and maintainability. Apply React best practices, memoization, and proper state management.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup UI components refactored with improved code quality
No regressions in popup functionality
Code passes lint and type checks
tasks.expectedResult: Refactored popup UI components and hooks with improved performance and maintainability.

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enhances user experience and code quality of popup UI.

tasks.title: Fix and Enhance Options Page Components and AI Settings Form
tasks.description: Review and fix bugs in options page components under apps/extension/src/options/components/, especially AiSettingsForm.tsx and GeneralSettings.tsx. Improve form validation, state management, and user feedback. Ensure settings persist correctly in chrome.storage.
acceptanceCriteria: Options page components fixed and improved
Settings persist and load correctly
Code passes lint and type checks
tasks.expectedResult: Options page components fixed with improved UX and reliable settings persistence.

outputPlan.description: Fixed AI settings form validation and persistence

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves extension settings reliability and user experience.

tasks.title: Verify and Fix Context Menu Integration and Content Script Injection
tasks.description: Test and fix the context menu items 'Save to IELTS Journey' and 'Explain with AI' for correct behavior and permissions. Ensure content scripts inject properly on supported pages and floating toolbar appears on text selection. Fix any injection or permission issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Context menu items appear and function correctly
Content scripts inject and run on target pages
Floating toolbar displays on text selection
No permission errors in console

commands: Manual testing in Chrome extension environment

tasks.expectedResult: Context menu and content script injection issues fixed and verified.

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures core user interactions work as expected.

tasks.title: Implement Unit and Integration Tests for Critical Extension Modules
tasks.description: Add or improve unit and integration tests for critical extension modules including highlight engine, background messaging, popup components, and storage bridge. Use existing test framework and coverage standards. Ensure tests cover edge cases and error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests added or improved for critical modules
Test coverage increased or maintained
All tests pass
tasks.expectedResult: Robust test suite for extension critical modules with passing tests.

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Increases reliability and maintainability of extension code.

tasks.title: Perform Full Build and Production Packaging of Extension
tasks.description: Run full build and production packaging commands for the extension to verify build pipeline correctness and produce production-ready artifacts in apps/extension/dist/.
acceptanceCriteria: Build completes without errors
Production package zip file created
tasks.expectedResult: Production build and package artifacts created successfully.

metadata.inputContext: Refactored and tested extension source code
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Produces production-ready extension package for deployment.

tasks.title: Validate Extension Functionality in Chrome with Production Build
tasks.description: Manually load the production build unpacked extension in Chrome, verify all features work correctly including popup, context menus, content scripts, storage sync, and AI integration. Document any remaining issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension loads without errors
All core features function as expected
No console errors or warnings
User experience is smooth and consistent
tasks.expectedResult: Verified production extension works correctly in Chrome environment.

evidence: No errors in Chrome extension console
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Confirms extension is production ready and stable.
